arts.ttl: Referee David Coote strongly refutes "false and defamatory allegations" regarding Leeds United game amid betting probe
arts.sum: Referee David Coote strongly refutes what he describes as "false and defamatory allegations" made against him for an incident involving a 2019 fixture between Leeds United and West Bromwich Albion.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke surely set to unleash “absolutely excellent” Leeds United star v Luton
arts.sum: Leeds United welcome Luton Town to Elland Road this evening looking to make it three wins on the bounce and return to top of the table. Leeds return to Elland Road this evening with the second of three games in the space of six days, taking on recently relegated Luton Town.

arts.ttl: Leeds issue statement as David Coote incident at centre of fresh FA probe revealed
arts.sum: The Football Association have launched an investigation after it was claimed that referee David Coote - who's currently suspended by the PGMOL - allegedly discussed giving a yellow card with a fan before a match

arts.ttl: Leeds United's transfer window challenge laid bare amid Cole Palmer point
arts.sum: A new No 10 is likely to be high on United's agenda when the transfer market reopens in January. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United may finally be onto the number 10 some called for in the summer
arts.sum: Leeds United host Luton Town in a 7.45pm kick-off at Elland Road tonight, with the chance to climb to the top of the Championship table. Daniel Farke hosts a Rob Edwards side with only three wins from their last 10 matches, but one loss in their last four.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder blasts “ridiculous” development as Leeds United feel the same struggle
arts.sum: Wins for Sheffield United and Burnley, plus a draw for Sunderland means that the trio overtook Leeds – but the opportunity to move two clear of third presents itself against Luton Town tonight. The Blades got back to winning ways to move above Leeds on Tuesday as they cruised to victory at home to Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Luton chief 'concerned' by away form as he puts it on his players to arrest Town's slump
arts.sum: Hatters have a tough ask at Elland Road this evening
